title: betonica officinalis subsp. velebitica
intro: Betonica officinalis subsp. velebitica, also known as Velebit mountain betony, is a subspecies of the betony plant, a type of flowering perennial native to the Velebit Mountains in Croatia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects, making it a valuable remedy for a range of health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in vitamins and minerals, and have been used to treat digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, betonica officinalis subsp. velebitica is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
